criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for features like budgeting, expense tracking, and financial advice.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's user interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered, such as budgeting, investment tracking, bill reminders, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Level of security measures implemented, such as encryption, multi-factor authentication, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Integration with Financial Institutions
criteria.description: Number and variety of financial institutions supported for seamless integration.

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of subscription plans, if any, and the value for money offered.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store update history, official blogs
